---
title: "HBN_gam_SES"
output: html_document
date: "2026-01-20"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(mgcv)
library(data.table)
```

```{r}
# Define root + dirs
# ROOT_DIR <- "/Users/bmacedo/Desktop/final_WM"
ROOT_DIR = "/mnt/isilon/bgdlab_hbcd/projects/macedo_wm_exposome/macedo_wm_exposome"

HARMONIZED_DIR <- file.path(ROOT_DIR, "output_data", "harmonized", "HBN")
FIG6_DIR <- file.path(ROOT_DIR, "output_data", "results", "main_figures", "figure6")

# create output dir if needed
if (!dir.exists(FIG6_DIR)) {
  dir.create(FIG6_DIR, recursive = TRUE)
}

# paths
in_path  <- file.path(HARMONIZED_DIR, "HBN_harmonized_refABCD16_01_20.csv")
out_path <- file.path(FIG6_DIR, "HBN_SES_partial_gam_results.csv")

dt <- fread(in_path)
cat("Rows:", nrow(dt), "Cols:", ncol(dt), "\n")
```

```{r}
target_cov <- "General_SES"
covars <- c("age", "sex", "qc_prediction")
msmt_cols <- grep("^bundle_", names(dt), value=TRUE)
dt[, sex := as.factor(sex)]
```

```{r}
run_partial_gam <- function(df, msmt_cols, target_cov="General_SES",
                            covars=c("age","sex","qc_prediction"),
                            k_age=6, min_n=30) {
  df <- as.data.table(df)
  out <- vector("list", length(msmt_cols))

  lin_covars <- setdiff(covars, "age")  # all linear besides age

  for (i in seq_along(msmt_cols)) {
    feat <- msmt_cols[i]
    d <- df[, c(feat, target_cov, covars), with=FALSE]
    d <- na.omit(d)

    if (nrow(d) < min_n) {
      out[[i]] <- data.table(feature=feat, covariate=target_cov,
                             partial_r=NA_real_, partial_R2=NA_real_,
                             p_value=NA_real_, p_fdr=NA_real_,
                             n=nrow(d), edf_age=NA_real_)
      next
    }

    d[, y := as.numeric(scale(get(feat)))]

    rhs_full <- paste0(target_cov, " + s(age, k=", k_age, ")",
      if (length(lin_covars) > 0) paste0(" + ", paste(lin_covars, collapse=" + ")) else ""
    )
    rhs_red <- paste0("s(age, k=", k_age, ")",
      if (length(lin_covars) > 0) paste0(" + ", paste(lin_covars, collapse=" + ")) else ""
    )

    m_full <- gam(as.formula(paste("y ~", rhs_full)), data=d, method="REML")
    m_red  <- gam(as.formula(paste("y ~", rhs_red)),  data=d, method="REML")

    # partial R2 analog via mgcv r.sq
    r2_full <- summary(m_full)$r.sq
    r2_red  <- summary(m_red)$r.sq
    partial_R2 <- (r2_full - r2_red) / (1 - r2_red)

    # nested test for adding SES (linear)
    a <- anova(m_red, m_full, test="F")
    p_val <- a$`Pr(>F)`[2]

    # signed partial r analog: correlate SES linear contribution with y residualized on reduced model
    beta <- unname(coef(m_full)[target_cov])
    partial_r <- sign(beta) * sqrt(abs(partial_R2))


    # record achieved edf for s(age)
    st <- summary(m_full)$s.table
    edf_age <- NA_real_
    if (!is.null(st) && nrow(st) > 0) {
      idx <- grep("^s\\(age\\)$", rownames(st))
      if (length(idx) == 1) edf_age <- as.numeric(st[idx, "edf"])
    }

    out[[i]] <- data.table(feature=feat, covariate=target_cov,
                           partial_r=partial_r,
                           partial_R2=partial_R2,
                           p_value=p_val,
                           n=nrow(d),
                           edf_age=edf_age)
  }

  res <- rbindlist(out)
  res[, p_fdr := p.adjust(p_value, method="BH")]
  res[]
}
```

```{r}
res <- run_partial_gam(df=dt, msmt_cols=msmt_cols, target_cov=target_cov, 
                       covars=covars, k_age=3, min_n=30)
```

```{r}
fwrite(res, out_path)
```
